name: Ribbon Fantasy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 1/2 cups sugar, 6 tablespoons margarine, and 1/3 cup evaporated milk in a saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a full boil over medium-high heat.
3. Continue boiling for 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and stir in chocolate chips until melted.
5. Stir in marshmallow cream and vanilla.
6. Beat until blended.
7. Pour into a greased 13x9 pan.
8. Repeat with the remaining ingredients, substituting peanut butter for chocolate chips.
9. Pour over chocolate layer.
10. Cover and chill until firm.
